UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Information about a registered user and their main database.

database.description: JSON string of the Database object (bairros, chats, etc) to maintain backward compatibility with local storage format while living in Firestore.

TerritoryShare.title: TerritoryShare
TerritoryShare.description: Publicly accessible document (via ID) that represents a shared territory for feedback.

ownerUid.description: The user ID of the owner

bairroName.description: Name of the bairro for display

territorioName.description: Name of the territorio for display

enderecos.description: JSON string of the Enderecos array for this territory so public can view without needing read access to owner's database.

Feedback.title: Feedback
Feedback.description: Feedback submitted on a shared territory.

shareId.description: The ID of the TerritoryShare this feedback belongs to

ownerUid.description: The user ID of the territory owner (so owner can query their feedbacks)

territorioId.description: The ID of the territory this feedback is for

bairroId.description: The ID of the bairro this feedback is for

publisherName.description: Name of the person who submitted the feedback

notes.description: JSON string of addressID -> note map

read.description: Whether the owner has read and cleared this feedback

users/{userId}.description: Stores user profiles and their serialized database to keep retro-compatibility.

feedbacks/{feedbackId}.description: Feedbacks submitted by people via the share links.
